title: Quiz: The Search Problem
description: Test your understanding of the search problem formulation

questions.question: The phase oracle O_f acts as:
questions.explanation: The phase oracle applies a phase of -1 to marked states.

questions.question: The initial state |s⟩ in Grover's algorithm is:
questions.explanation: We start with uniform superposition: equal amplitude on all states.

questions.question: For N items, the initial probability of measuring the marked item is:
questions.explanation: Each state has amplitude 1/√N, so probability = (1/√N)² = 1/N.

questions.question: The phase oracle is a diagonal matrix.
questions.explanation: The phase oracle only adds phases, never mixing states, so it's diagonal.
